market_pulse: EDC Week driving massive DJ talent concentration across the Strip; LIV executing strong tier-1 headliner strategy while competitors (Encore, OMNIA) running parallel lineups.

content_gaps.description: Omnia Dayclub opening May 15 getting significant PR/news coverage while LIV silent on comparable new initiatives
